title: [MTR4] French Buses
description: This pack adds retextured Mercedes-Benz eCitaro and MAN Lion's City 12E buses - Models by NonPlayerCharacter
body:
This pack adds the following buses (v1.1) :
- MAN Lion's City 12E (Blank)
- Mercedes-Benz eCitaro (Blank)
- Mercedes-Benz eCitaro (RATP fictional livery)
- Mercedes-Benz eCitaro (STAR livery)
- Mercedes-Benz eCitaro (Chronostar livery)
- MCV C127 (Blank)

All models have been made by NonPlayerCharacter.

The following bus will be added in v1.2:
- Mercedes-Benz eCitaro (Lignes d'Azur livery)
